domain: Tswana kgotla (Botswana public-assembly tradition): consensus-seeking village/tribal assembly under chief (Kgosi); mmualebe proverb 'even one who speaks badly must be allowed to speak'; go-tshwaraganya = Kgosi wraps up multiple views into synthesized final decision; 1800s origin; modern role in village-community agreement; anti-polarization mechanism; consensus over majority-vote
specific_mechanism: KGOTLA-MMUALEBE-OPEN-SPEAK-CHAIR-WRAP-UP-CONSENSUS-MULTI-AGENT: K-agent consensus communication with (1) open-speak inclusion-by-default O_open: every of K agents permitted ≥1 message per round; no agent silenced by routing (mmualebe principle); (2) chair-LLM K_chair wrap-up synthesis: 1 designated chair-LLM consumes all K agent outputs + emits final synthesized decision D_final via go-tshwaraganya operation (multi-view weighted union); (3) mmualebe weak-voice preservation L_mmu regularizer: boosting low-confidence/low-fluency agent contributions during synthesis to prevent dominant-agent monopoly; (4) acacia-tree fixed-context shared-space: all K agents read from same shared-context buffer; no agent has private-context advantage; consensus-construction grounded in equal-access; (5) anti-polarization gradient L_polarity: explicit penalty on output-divergence between top-2 contributing agents to encourage convergent-not-divergent rounds. Differs from R513 UMUNNA-KINDRED-SPOKESPERSON-2-TIER (2-tier kindred cluster + spokesperson agreement-score + low-bandwidth council K-spokesperson + umuada complementary parallel-track + gender-balanced final, no mmualebe open-speak default + no Kgosi chair-wrap-up + no go-tshwaraganya synthesis + no weak-voice preservation + no acacia-tree shared-context + no anti-polarization gradient) and R525 SABAR-BAKKS-TAMA-LEAD-CONVERSATION (bakks fixed-utterance + tama lead-query + polyrhythmic concurrent + linguistic-pattern + ask-respond bind, no open-speak + no chair-synthesis + no weak-voice + no shared-context + no anti-polarization) by mmualebe open-speak inclusion-default + Kgosi chair-wrap-up go-tshwaraganya synthesis + weak-voice preservation regularizer + acacia-tree shared-context + anti-polarization divergence penalty.
llm_application: KGOTLA-MMUALEBE-OPEN-SPEAK-CHAIR-WRAP-UP-CONSENSUS-MULTI-AGENT K-agent consensus communication + open-speak inclusion-by-default O_open all K agents ≥1 message per round no-routing-silence + chair-LLM K_chair wrap-up go-tshwaraganya synthesis multi-view weighted union final D_final + mmualebe weak-voice preservation L_mmu regularizer boost low-confidence-low-fluency contributions + acacia-tree fixed-context shared-space equal-access buffer + anti-polarization gradient L_polarity output-divergence top-2 penalty. Differs from R392. R403. R411. R443. R449. R463. R465. R488. R500. R513 UMUNNA (closest — 2-tier + spokesperson + low-bandwidth council). R525 SABAR-BAKKS (closest — bakks + tama + polyrhythmic + linguistic-pattern). Differs from CONSENSAGENT + Multi-Agent Debate + Collaboration Survey 2501.06322 + Agentic Consensus by mmualebe-default + chair-synthesis + weak-voice + shared-context + anti-polarization. Differs by MMUALEBE OPEN-SPEAK INCLUSION-DEFAULT + KGOSI CHAIR-WRAP-UP GO-TSHWARAGANYA SYNTHESIS + WEAK-VOICE PRESERVATION REGULARIZER + ACACIA-TREE SHARED-CONTEXT + ANTI-POLARIZATION DIVERGENCE PENALTY.
novelty_claim: CONSENSAGENT ACL 2025 + Multi-Agent Debate + Collaboration Survey 2501.06322 + Agentic Supply-Chain Consensus 2025 cover multi-agent consensus + sycophancy-mitigation + debate space. KGOTLA-MMUALEBE-OPEN-SPEAK-CHAIR-WRAP-UP-CONSENSUS-MULTI-AGENT adds (a) mmualebe open-speak inclusion default + (b) Kgosi chair-wrap-up go-tshwaraganya synthesis + (c) weak-voice preservation regularizer + (d) acacia-tree shared-context + (e) anti-polarization output-divergence penalty. Recombination — borderline lookup.
